notes: Note: Left hand wall-follow, skip the first opening, take the second and cross the bridge (red part), left hand wall-follow to the waypoint.Then go to the Ossuary (1), after that the Torched Courts (2). Optional are the Reliquary (3, quest for rare belt) and the Control Blocks (4), quest with boss for a passive point. Finish by going through The Canals (5). Do your cruel labyrinth before going to the Canals as killing Kitava will lower your resistances.
